Pacific North West
programme.desc: Explored Seattle: Pike Place Market (est. 1907), IFly's indoor wind tunnel, and Museum of Flight Aviation with a thrilling jet simulator ride. A day filled with history, adventure, and aviation excitement!

programme.title: Short Circuits
programme.desc: Smorph is finding it hard to finish his painting in the dark and his lamp is not working properly. Perhaps it has a short circuit that needs fixing?

programme.title: The President (F.W. de Klerk) and The Pioneer (Valerie Amos)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, former President of South Africa and Nobel Peace Prize winner President F.W. de Klerk and first Black woman member of the British Government and pioneering British diplomat Valerie Amos share their life lessons.

programme.title: Folded Paper, Hopping Frog
programme.desc: Can you turn a two-dimensional sheet of paper into a three-dimensional hopping frog? In this episode we explain the geometry behind paper folding and teach you how to create your own 3D aquarium! Crock, crock!

programme.title: Day of the Diamond
programme.desc: Something sparkly and expensive is accidentally delivered to the flat, and Ricky thinks a scary man now wants it back. Ricky makes a photogram inspired by Man Ray, a piggy bank robber, and a very precious and extremely cool ice sculpture.

programme.title: Trip to Australia
programme.desc: Zoe bumps her head on a metal light fitting and is looking for medicine to relieve the pain of the headache. In Australia, some people treat headaches with plants. Our heroes will have to meet William and Japaljarri, and they will be surprised!

programme.title: Doki's Double Trouble
programme.desc: While touring Cape Canaveral, Florida, the Team meets Doki's doppelganger, an astronaut named Duncan. Doki excitedly asks - what does it take to be an astronaut? – and Duncan gives him the chance to find out!

programme.title: Star
programme.desc: Boom should guess what Reds draw on the floor.

programme.title: Stickers
programme.desc: An accumulation of stickers creates an abstract and nice composition.

programme.title: The Golden Girl (Kelly Holmes) and The Spaceman (Tim Peake)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, Kelly Holmes reflects on how she became a double Olympic gold medallist and Tim Peake shares his journey from test pilot to the UK's first European Space Agency astronaut to stay on the International Space Station.

programme.title: Life-Changing Operation
programme.desc: Just when Jamie thought he'd conquered his fear of goats, he's sent to the Highlands to track down and treat a giant mountain goat that needs its hooves trimmed. And there's a life-changing operation for a border collie, Joke.

programme.title: The Proteus Factor
programme.desc: Proteus traps the Aronnax in a magnetic field and kidnaps Ant, believing he is the key to finding Lemuria.

programme.title: Do Giants Like Hexagons?
programme.desc: The Giant's Causeway in Northern Ireland is made up of around 40,000 interlocking basalt columns, most of which are hexagonal. Nature is very efficient, so it uses this hexagonal arrangement in many places, such as bubbles and beehives.

programme.title: The Proteus Factor
programme.desc: Proteus traps the Aronnax in a magnetic field and kidnaps Ant, believing he is the key to finding Lemuria.

programme.desc: The Haenyeo Table follows the daily lives and labor of Jeju female divers, and the table scenery they encounter at the end.

programme.title: E4 - Thrissur
programme.desc: Luke Nguyen circumnavigates southern India, discovering the sounds,meeting local cooks and chefs,who introduce him to the world of Indian cuisine.

programme.desc: Eating is a lifestyle. Jason Yeoh showcases his daily meals, whether he's dining out, choosing ingredients, or home cooking.

programme.desc: In the tropics, huge areas of rainforest have been cleared in order to obtain timber and to gain pasture and arable land.

programme.title: E2 - You You's Tale
programme.desc: As we learn about the problems that arise from artificially breeding giant pandas, we follow the progress of You You the last panda to give birth this season.

programme.title: E3 - Bali Island Of Gods And Demons
programme.desc: Come with us on a unique journey to Southeast Asia - a region that could hardly be more diverse.

programme.title: E3 - Mei Sheng's Tale
programme.desc: We follow 4 year old Mei Sheng a panda born in San Diego Zoo, California as he travels to Wolong, a natural homeland he's never known.

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Michael Wong
programme.desc: Michael Wong rose to prominence on the big screen in the 80s with his “half Chinese, half foreign' identity and eye-catching appearance, from the early rebellious and unruly big boy to the tough and strong policeman role later. Looking back the bygone days, he barely knew Cantonese but was fortunate to meet a like-minded partner who helped him through the break-in period, and which film from his decades-long career impressed him the most? After played countless roles, how does he feel about his identity as an actor?

programme.title: God Of Gamblers 3 - The Early Stage
programme.desc: At the first God of Gamblering contest, Ko Chun is told to lose the contest as his master's interests in betting the champion. Ko refuses and is shot by his enraged master...

programme.title: Brief Encounter In Shinjuku
programme.desc: Foon, a Public Relations manager, starts a happy life with his wife Ann after remarrying her. Kwan, a new public relation officer in Foon's department, falls in love with Foon after he shields her from being criticized, when there is friction between Foon and Ann. Thus Foon falls in love with Kwan gradually. After a business trip to Tokyo, their relationship becomes much closer, while Ann meets Chu, a councilor, who falls in love with her but can't get Ann's response. When returning to Hong Kong, Kwan doesn't want to destroy Foon's family and decides to marry her fianc? When Foon is depressed by this, Ann finds out the truth. Another rupture breaks out again.

programme.desc: Through the captivating stories presented in We Are One, the viewers can fully immerse themselves in the narratives and witness the genuine emotions that arise between humans and animals. programme.title: E224
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Each episode of My Hong Kong Story features a Hong Kong native, or those who surround their tale here. E20 - Pyjamas
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'pyjamas' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today, we see lots of different pyjamas - pink pyjamas, striped pyjamas, spotty pyjamas and banana pyjamas.

programme.title: E17 - Pavlova
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Cafe in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: E10 - The Metal Detector Badge
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.title: E42 - Floating Farms, Bangladesh
programme.desc: Glitch's trip to a funky floating farm becomes a rescue mission on a fast-flowing river.

programme.title: E14 - Mum School
programme.desc: Bluey plays mum to a brood of bouncy balloons, including an irrepressible floater named Greenie. But she soon discovers that mothering is much harder than she imagined.

programme.title: E29 - Puppets
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: E38 - The Dressing Up Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is wrapping a present because it is Enid's birthday. But the squirrels didn't get her anything!

programme.title: E37 - The Traffic Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels begin a trip to the lake, but get stuck in a traffic jam!

programme.title: E49 - Go Jet Academy: Global Gameshow
programme.desc: It's the Go Jetters as you've never seen them before as they take part in a disco dazzling around the world gameshow!

programme.title: E48 - Chocolate Hills, Philippines
programme.desc: Greedy Grandmaster Glitch has been gorging on chocolate and wants more! The Grimbots discover a place called the Chocolate Hills on Bohol Island in the Philippines and take him there.

programme.title: E37 - Pond Prose
programme.desc: Sarah is inspired by listening to a poetry record and decides to make up some poetry of her own.

programme.title: E18 - It's Time To Put On A Show
programme.desc: JoJo doesn't know what to do with her odd socks, so Gran Gran suggests they put on a puppet show! The two of them turn the socks into puppets, ready for a show in the garden.

programme.title: E12 - Housework
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: E13 - Pass The Parcel
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: E14 - Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: E13 - The Breakfast Badge
programme.desc: Tag's feeling grumpy because he didn't eat his breakfast, uh-oh!

programme.title: E6 - Garlic
programme.desc: Fitness guru, Garlic, has a set of fun exercises to make you stronger.

programme.title: E12 - Sweetieland Saga
programme.desc: Evil Pea cheats Chilli out of winning floofy teddies at a funfair made from sweets, so Supertato and the Veggies must get the teddies back before it's too late!

programme.desc: Big straws appear in Teletubbyland and Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa-Laa and Po wonder what to do with them. The Teletubbies blow through the straws to make colourful bubbles.

programme.title: E1 - Rain
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'rain' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today's episode is all about rain!

programme.title: E18 - Rain
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: E17 - Pavlova
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Cafe in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: E12 - The Waiting Badge
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: E2 - Cup
programme.desc: Bella plays with her favourite cup - it makes the perfect drum for a sing along with Lift. Together, they visit Kingsley and Queenie who play the 'Tea Party Dash', but who will win?

programme.title: E39 - The Getting On Badge
programme.desc: When the squirrels upset the mole by being noisy, Duggee suggests some team building.

programme.title: E38 - The Dressing Up Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is wrapping a present because it is Enid's birthday. But the squirrels didn't get her anything!

programme.title: E37 - The Traffic Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels begin a trip to the lake, but get stuck in a traffic jam!

programme.title: E50 - Horsetail Fall, California
programme.desc: The team are at Horsetail Fall in the Yosemite Nation Park to watch the 300m high waterfall become Firefall. Can the team save snowy Princess Glorinda and Firefall at the Yosemite National park?

programme.title: E49 - Go Jet Academy: Global Gameshow
programme.desc: It's the Go Jetters as you've never seen them before as they take part in a disco dazzling around the world gameshow!

programme.title: E11 - Sonny's Second Chance
programme.desc: Sonny returns to Sodor to try to be a really useful engine again but some of the other trains aren't willing to give him a second chance.

programme.title: E37 - Pond Prose
programme.desc: Sarah is inspired by listening to a poetry record and decides to make up some poetry of her own.

programme.title: E9 - I Don't Like Bananas
programme.desc: From broccoli soup to cheeseburgers and blue cheese, the funny animals chat about the best and worst things to eat.

programme.title: E13 - Pass The Parcel
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: E14 - Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: E14 - The Family Photo Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn that friends can be like an extended family.

programme.title: E13 - The Breakfast Badge
programme.desc: Tag's feeling grumpy because he didn't eat his breakfast, uh-oh!

programme.title: E18 - Animals
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

E4 - A Fun Day of Games & Construction
programme.desc: Get ready for playground games & construction fun! First, the crew has to build a crazy golf course! After they finish, they decide to try it out, but something goes wrong every time! Then, at the beach, Digley & Dazey challenge each other to a sandcastle competition. They each build castles that get bigger & sillier, & after some bickering, they decide to build one giant castle together! Plus, learn the alphabet & sing 'If You're Happy & You Know It'!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Digley, Dazey & the crew for a big day of rescues & learning! When the barn at Old MacDonald's Farm catches fire, the crew uses quick thinking to extinguish the flames. Then, a trip to the mountains goes wrong when an avalanche traps them in a tunnel, & they must find a clever way to escape! The rescues continue as Digley faces his fear of heights to restore a broken clock & the friends work together to save Scout after she falls down a hole during a thunderstorm.

programme.title: E2 - What Will JJ Learn Today?
programme.desc: What will JJ learn today? Join him for a week of fun as he learns why each day is special. Then, celebrate Valentine's Day with the Melon Patch kids as they show they care with gifts & kind words. The learning continues as Bella helps teach the class the ASL alphabet & Daniela teaches the differences between the English & Spanish ABCs! From visiting a petting zoo to learning about recycling, there's a new lesson every day!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Fun & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Mia & Max for a big day of fun & learning! First, they go on a lovely little train ride with Tootson & their special friend Twinkle to learn all about shapes. Then, they hop on the Big Red Bus with Daddy, moving their hands like wheels going 'round & wipers going 'swish'! The learning continues as they have a musical drumming session with saucepans, play a game of 'What's In The Bag?' & learn about the world around them while singing & dancing.

programme.title: E3 - Sleep Music With Twinkle
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - Let's Play All The Best Games!
programme.desc: It's time to play all the best games with Kii & Yii! The fun begins with a high-stakes game of Red Light, Green Light, where Jeepbot is 'It' with a slime cannon blaster! Then, Kii & Yii play a fun game of life-size Snakes & Ladders, complete with toy snakes & big ladders. The competition continues with a game of Duck, Duck, Goose in mini race cars & a summer pool party game of Marco Polo with Snappy Croc!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Teamwork & Rescue Special!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate teamwork & rescue special with Kii & Yii! The adventure begins when Princess Cat is flying her plane but gets in a sticky jammy mess, causing her to lose control! It's up to Kii & Yii to get her down safely. Then, the friends are playing near Princess Cat's castle when she accidentally falls down the well & needs to be rescued again! From helping Humpty Dumpty to rounding up runaway vegetables, Kii & Yii always save the day!

programme.title: E2 - Let's All Help Each Other!
programme.desc: It's a day of helping each other at Lellobee City Farm! When a mama songbird's eggs are about to hatch, Mei, Ella & Rishi build her a beautiful bird feeding table so she can take care of her new chicks. Then, when Heidi the Horse is feeling down in the dumps, Ella & all the friends put on a show & give her a big group hug to make her feel happy again! The helping continues as everyone learns the importance of sharing their veggies with a visiting gopher.

programme.title: E4 - Baby John's Family Are His Heroes!
programme.desc: Baby John thinks his family members are the best heroes! He really loves & admires his dad, & wants to copy everything he does to be just like him. His big brother Jack is a hero, too, & is always willing to help his little brother & teach him new things. After Mom's cupcakes go missing, Baby John dresses up as a police officer to find out who took them, interviewing each of his family member heroes!

programme.title: E2 - When Cute Creatures Cause Big Chaos!
programme.desc: Watch out, because these cute creatures are causing big chaos! First, Chroma the Magic Pet has a cold, & every time she sneezes, she causes a huge color splat! Mila & Morphle must find her before the whole city is covered in color. Then, the Baby Morphles arrive from another dimension & they are in the mood for a game of chase! From a giant living doll to a runaway magic pet, these cute creatures are causing chaos everywhere!

programme.title: E3 - Races, Games & Helping Friends!
programme.desc: Join the crew for some fun competitions & a day of helping friends! First, the friends compete in a fun obstacle course to see who can finish the race the fastest & lift the special trophy! Then, just as the crew is ready to demolish an old building, a cute cat hops inside, & the team must rescue the kitten before finishing the job. The helping continues as they save another kitten from a dangerous situation & Dazey must think fast to save Mrs. Skip from a runaway river barge!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Teamwork & Rescue Special!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate teamwork & rescue special with Kii & Yii! programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Rediscovering China
programme.desc: Rediscovering China is a half-hour documentary program on CGTN. Each edition offers unique insight into various aspects of life in China today. With unrivalled access to the country's people and places, the program aims to show the global audience an inclusive and vigorous China.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ''living in the future'!

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: L'édition nuit : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: L'actualité ne s'arrête jamais. Un journal complet consacré à l'information française et internationale, pour rester informé à tout moment, où que l'on soit dans le monde.

programme.title: A la une : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Tout ce qui fait et fera la une de la journée : économie, international, analyses et décryptages, revue de presse et grands temps forts à venir, pour suivre en continu les événements majeurs en France et dans le monde.

programme.title: A la une : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Tout ce qui fait et fera la une de la journée : économie, international, analyses et décryptages, revue de presse et grands temps forts à venir, pour suivre en continu les événements majeurs en France et dans le monde.

programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un flux d'actualités en continu pour suivre en temps réel les breaking news, les sujets tendances et les analyses sur la culture, la santé, la technologie et l'environnement. Reste informé de tout ce qui compte, au moment où cela se passe en continu 24/7.

programme.title: À l'affiche
programme.desc: Comment les cinéastes, les romanciers, les artistes racontent-ils le monde ? France 24 part à la rencontre d'une culture engagée dans son temps.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: Le Paris des arts
programme.desc: Une balade culturelle dans Paris en compagnie d'un invité. Avec des sujets présentés des ponts d'un art à un autre, d'un artiste à l'autre, de la France au reste du monde.

programme.title: Culture prime
programme.desc: Des vidéos culturelles réunies sous un même label et une identité visuelle cohérente, portées par une ligne éditoriale commune : raconter l'actualité à travers le prisme de la culture.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: Reporters
programme.desc: Avec les équipes de France 24 et les grands reporters aux quatre coins du monde, une découverte des reportages long format sur des sujets d'actualité internationale.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: Les observateurs
programme.desc: Une émission réalisée à partir de contenus amateurs : photos ou vidéos, tout vient des observateurs du monde entier. Les contenus sont vérifiés par la rédaction de la chaîne.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: News Around Japan
programme.desc: Program introduces the latest news from all over Japan.

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: Songs Of Our Generation
programme.desc: The music program, hosted by Oizumi Yo, presents the greatest hits of J-pop from the 1960s to the present with high-quality sound and footage.

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: Part 2
programme.desc: Veteran rakugo storyteller Shofukutei Tsurube travels across Japan with a personality, introducing families they meet along the way.

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: The Fountain Of Ancient Wisdom
programme.desc: The challenges we face today are similar to what our forerunners went through. The program searches for clues to solve problems, utilizing the wisdoms of historical figures.

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there's no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there's no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: Cooking For Beginners
programme.desc: Tips on cooking for beginners.

programme.title: Cooking For Beginners
programme.desc: Tips on cooking for beginners.

programme.title: Cooking For Beginners
programme.desc: Tips on cooking for beginners.

programme.title: French In A Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let's learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. Furthermore, we explore tips for “happiness” and various forms of “joy” through the unique European way of thinking and values behind their languages and lifestyles.

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: Kid's Discovery
programme.desc: In this program, children around the age of 4 can experience the pleasure of playing with friends, the wonder of life, the joy of doing thigs by themselves, and consideration for others, all while having fun through various discoveries.

programme.title: E36
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: World Weather

programme.title: E37
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there's no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there's no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: TV Patrol Express[Live]
programme.desc: TV Patrol Express, hosted by Jeff Canoy and Denice Dinsay is a quick look at the top stories of the day. A fifteen minute fast-paced newscast, it offers a glimpse of breaking news, stories that developed, and updates to watch out for on TV Patrol for the on-the-go viewer.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: E2 - Fantastic Frogs
programme.desc: Cape Town, South Africa is home to twenty types of frogs, but many are threatened by urban development. Meet a variety of the region’s species as we follow western leopard toads on their tenuous journey to breed in the city’s shrinking wetlands.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Discover how weirdness is baked into some animals’ DNA from birth. Check out the bowerbird’s funky mate-attracting dance moves, the Christmas Island crab’s traffic-dodging prowess, and the sockeye salmon’s incredible uphill swimming skills.

programme.title: E1 - The Power of Playtime
programme.desc: Explore the ways that animals use play, including young gibbons in Thailand that practice falling from branches, elderly macaques that preserve their brains with playtime, and games that sharpen the profound intelligence of African elephants.

programme.title: E2 - Rules of the Game
programme.desc: Young hyenas compete in tug of war, mischievous parrots play at picking apart tourists’ cars, and Atlantic spotted dolphins enjoy sophisticated social games amid seaweed—all following specific rules that hone social bonds.

programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: A Superman who's driven by compassion and an inherent belief in the goodness of humankind.

programme.title: E19 - King Koil
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen spend the day volunteering at Repto Ranch and come face-to-face with King Koil. They need to overcome their fear of snakes quickly if they are to defeat the slithery baddie.

programme.title: E21 - That's The Stuff
programme.desc: While on a tour at a space museum, Ben's excitement multiplies when he learns that some recently discovered 'space stuff' is being examined inside the museum's lab.

programme.title: E13 - Mini Mentors
programme.desc: Sunny has to perform for his old school teacher and mentor.

programme.title: E14 - Too Cool For School
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: E13 - Parma
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode in the All Stars competition, the chefs are treated to a culinary dream trip to Parma, the legendary home of Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese and Prosciutto di Parma ham. After getting a behind the scenes tour of some traditional multi-generational factories of these exclusive products, the chefs must feature these ingredients in two courses and serve their dishes to a table of 16 Michelin stars. Pasta master, Chef Evan Funke, sits in as the guest judge along with Tom, Padma, Gail and a bevy of celebrated Italian super-star chefs. One chef is eliminated as only the top three will move on to the finale.

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E32
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 只有最頂層的0.1%人口可住在天空城堡——一個獨特的住宅社區。在上流社會的「SKY Castle」中更住著一群欲扶助丈夫事業和培育子女成為二代貴族的貴婦。然而，這些貴婦都有一個秘密不能告訴任何人。她們的財富、榮譽和最重要的權力鬥爭從現在開始！

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 只有最頂層的0.1%人口可住在天空城堡——一個獨特的住宅社區。在上流社會的「SKY Castle」中更住著一群欲扶助丈夫事業和培育子女成為二代貴族的貴婦。然而，這些貴婦都有一個秘密不能告訴任何人。她們的財富、榮譽和最重要的權力鬥爭從現在開始！

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.desc: It's one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. programme.title: Morning Call
programme.desc: Morning Call, anchored by Morgan Brennan, delivers the essential market intelligence that drives the trading day ahead. programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Morinichi Hinako: The Night Of Indulgence
Morinichi Hinako: The Night Of Indulgence
Morinichi Hinako: The Night Of Indulgence
Morinichi Hinako: The Night Of Indulgence
Morinichi Hinako: The Night Of Indulgence
E1 - Highlight 1
programme.desc: A 44-ton Artic straddling the central reservation of the M1 is a rush hour headache for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve and one of the youngest Recovery Ops on the team, Pat. Down South, Lantern Recovery op Steve rescues a broken down 26-ton dustcart from a busy London street. Crouch Recovery op Jim gets drenched as he risks life and limb trying to get a broken-down tractor back to its farm – just a hundred yards away! And Lantern’s night shift recovery op Jason faces a battle to rescue an articulated lorry that’s crashed down a steep ditch off the A1.

programme.title: E8 - No Guts, No Glory
programme.desc: In the season finale, survival expert Bear Grylls selects the winner of $500,000 after a relentless journey to New Zealand’s West Coast --‐ a wet, rainforest amidst torrential downpour where only one team will “Get Out Alive”.

programme.title: E3 - Highlight 3
programme.desc: Crouch Recovery Op Jim and heavy mechanic Jack are faced with an increasingly complex recovery challenge. A foreign truck with dodgy suspension airbags and a catalogue of other problems makes towing it anywhere a real headache and a potential threat to other road users. Lantern Recovery op Sean is in a race against time to get a fully loaded dual tanker off a busy stretch of motorway. And recovery op Merrie has a nightmare when an unforeseeable problem leaves her stranded in a live lane of the motorway when towing a car transporter.

programme.title: E4 - Highlight 4
programme.desc: A digger as fallen off the back of a lorry and rolled over on its side - blocking one side of a busy A road. Crouch recovery Incident Manager Steve must work out how to get the vehicle upright without being able to close the whole road – a tricky challenge indeed! Richard Crouch and recovery op Lee Brown have a hay bale of a time trying to get a valuable straw load on a broken-down trailer back safely to its owner. And Crouch recovery op Marta earns her daily bread rescuing a stricken van load of loaves.

programme.title: E2 - Northern Territory
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E5 - Highlights 5
programme.desc: After eight days in the wild, the physical strain is taking its toll on the four remaining celebrities - but they know a place in the final is within reach. For their first task, they split into two teams and build rafts to get them safely across an estuary. However, the tide is coming in and with it the danger of a shark attack. Once across they each have to build their own shelter, to demonstrate what they have learnt from their experience, and are shocked by Bear's demonstration of how to stay hydrated when there is no clean water available. Will they take up the challenge to repeat his very personal method or walk?

programme.title: E6 - Highlights 6
programme.desc: Finalists Samantha Barks, Jason Gardiner and Alex Scott fight it out to be crowned ultimate mission survivor. The first task sees the trio traversing a rocky coastline and performing a commando crawl 80ft above crashing waves. They no longer have any rations, so they must then forage for seafood in the shallows and rockpools, before joining Bear, Meg and Scott around the campfire to reflect on the competition. The next morning, Bear has a couple of surprises to see how they react to adversity, and then they face their last two challenges - making fire, a primary skill for a survivor, and racing to the top of a 65ft sheer cliff face.

And recovery op Merrie has a nightmare when an unforeseeable problem leaves her stranded in a live lane of the motorway when towing a car transporter.

programme.title: E4 - Highlight 4
programme.desc: A digger as fallen off the back of a lorry and rolled over on its side - blocking one side of a busy A road. Crouch recovery Incident Manager Steve must work out how to get the vehicle upright without being able to close the whole road – a tricky challenge indeed! Richard Crouch and recovery op Lee Brown have a hay bale of a time trying to get a valuable straw load on a broken-down trailer back safely to its owner. And Crouch recovery op Marta earns her daily bread rescuing a stricken van load of loaves.

programme.title: E2 - Northern Territory
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E5 - Highlights 5
programme.desc: After eight days in the wild, the physical strain is taking its toll on the four remaining celebrities - but they know a place in the final is within reach. For their first task, they split into two teams and build rafts to get them safely across an estuary. However, the tide is coming in and with it the danger of a shark attack. Once across they each have to build their own shelter, to demonstrate what they have learnt from their experience, and are shocked by Bear's demonstration of how to stay hydrated when there is no clean water available. Will they take up the challenge to repeat his very personal method or walk?

programme.title: E6 - Highlights 6
programme.desc: Finalists Samantha Barks, Jason Gardiner and Alex Scott fight it out to be crowned ultimate mission survivor. The first task sees the trio traversing a rocky coastline and performing a commando crawl 80ft above crashing waves. They no longer have any rations, so they must then forage for seafood in the shallows and rockpools, before joining Bear, Meg and Scott around the campfire to reflect on the competition. The next morning, Bear has a couple of surprises to see how they react to adversity, and then they face their last two challenges - making fire, a primary skill for a survivor, and racing to the top of a 65ft sheer cliff face.

programme.title: E8 - No Guts, No Glory
programme.desc: In the season finale, survival expert Bear Grylls selects the winner of $500,000 after a relentless journey to New Zealand’s West Coast --‐ a wet, rainforest amidst torrential downpour where only one team will “Get Out Alive”.

programme.title: E106
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E56 - Les Gets (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Les Gets, going to the market to meet local residents. Today, she focuses on the resort, its residents and its facilities.

programme.title: E10 - Reading The Trees
programme.desc: With Nicolas Meisser, geologist and mineralogist, Matthieu explores a little-known side of the Bex salt mines, between collapsed galleries and sparkling snow-white crystals of gypsum. Followed by an equally timeless immersion, in wood. Fabien Langenegger is a dendrochronologist, seeking out the ancient lake villages beneath the waters of Neuchatel Lake.

programme.title: E17 - The Craze For Protein-Enriched Foods
programme.desc: We are seeing more and more processed products bearing labels such as ''high in protein'' or ''excellent source of protein.'' Do we really need all these foods? Also featured: titanium cutting boards; delicious Egyptian dishes; rougaille, a Mauritian speciality.

programme.title: E19 - Special Haute Couture Shows Autumn/Winter 2023-2024
programme.desc: The best of the season with Dior, Charles de Vilmorin, Schiaparelli, Iris Van Herpen, Chanel, Stephane Rolland, Julien Fournier, and Jean Paul Gaultier. Four designers stand out: Mohammed Ashi, Sara Chraibi, Rahul Mishra, and Adeline Andre. Male fashion with Pharrell Williams for Louis Vuitton, Kim Jones for Dior and EgonLab.

programme.title: E3 - Rigby's Body/Do Me A Solid/Busted Cart/K.I.L.I.T. Radio/Video 101
programme.desc: When Rigby eats too much junk food, his body forces out his consciousness. Rigby, Mordecai and Skips set out on a quest to get it back before sunset.

programme.title: E409 - Star Of The Day/Diabolical Labyrinth/Cozy Nest/Strong Will/Desired Orientation/24-Car
programme.desc: While he was falling, Grizzy performed a series of acrobatics that amazed the Lemmings.

programme.title: E133 - Telephone Pole Gags 2: Shrinking Telephone Pole / In The Road Again!/Cro-Mag Numbskul
programme.desc: Tweety spies a puddy from his perch.

programme.title: E18 - B. The DVD/The Third/The Debt/The Pressure/The Painting
programme.desc: Gumball is desperate to avoid a late fee on the rented dvd he accidentally destroyed.

programme.title: E2 - Models, Muscles, And Milk Vans
programme.desc: A 1950s Divco milk van leaves appraiser Todd Wertman speechless. Addison inspects a highly customized 1953 Buick Roadmaster and a 1964 ambulance/hearse combo.

programme.title: E9 - Safari Style
programme.desc: Tommy and the crew pay homage to the '71 East African Safari Rally winner by transforming a brand-new Nissan Z into an era-specific ride.

programme.title: E2 - Zombie Bikes Vs Zombie Apocalypse
programme.desc: Zack Courts and Ari Henning look at what bike they would want during a zombie apocalypse. They may end up building their own superbike.

programme.title: E1 - A Mustang's Twists And Turns
programme.desc: A good client brings in a problematic 1965 Mustang expecting Noah and his crew to transform this twisted shell of a car and into a beast at the track.

programme.title: Regal Studio Presents
programme.desc: A collection of weekly specials which feature timely, feel-good stories.

programme.title: E407 - Zoo U / A Remembrance of Grand-Past
programme.desc: The Star family goes on a college tour for Patrick... at the zoo. // GrandPat shares his life stories to spoil every movie at the theater.

programme.title: E609 - The Last Laugh
programme.desc: Luan thinks Mr. Coconuts is out for revenge when she replaces him with Lola in her act.

programme.title: E802 - Steeling Thunder / Be Careful What you Fish For
programme.desc: To win their school film festival, Lincoln and Clyde cast Lynn as their movie's extreme stunt double. // A fishing trip with Gramps turns into an obsessive chase when Gramps' old fish rival, Moby Rick, swims nearby.

programme.title: E209 - Summer Chuseok / Putting Up with the Plovers
programme.desc: In an attempt to get out of the dentist, Lily insists on a summer celebration of the fall holiday Chuseok. // When Will accidentally befriends an annoying man, his sorry attempts at a break-up make things painfully awkward for the whole family.

programme.title: E711 - Leave No Van Behind / Sponsor Tripped
programme.desc: Vanzilla breaks down. // Lynn and friends enjoy free perks around Royal Wood.

programme.title: E405 - Brawl In The Hall
programme.desc: When Charlotte is challenged to a fight at school, Captain Man and Kid Danger step in to try and help Charlotte defend herself.

programme.title: E114 - Shrinking Stars / FitzPatrick
programme.desc: The Star family finds themselves getting smaller and smaller. // Patrick's evil twin cousin shows up to ruin Patrick' reputation.

programme.title: E208 - Henry's Jelly
programme.desc: After Jasper is lauded for being a local hero, Henry becomes jealous that Kid Danger is the one getting thanks while Henry himself gets nothing.

programme.title: E804 - InTODDnito / Weather Or Not
programme.desc: When Darcy's birthday party falls on the same day as one of Lisa's hero scientist's talks, Lisa sends TODD in her place to the party. // Flip sees a lucrative business opportunity when he discovers Nacho has the ability to predict the weather.

programme.title: E408 - Upturn's Downturn
programme.desc: The Patricks compete in a series of games for control of the TV remote. // After driving over Patrick, a court order forces Lady Upturn to live with the Star family.

programme.title: E903 - Meet the Purrents / Apartment Complex
programme.desc: When Lori and Bobby find a kitten, they decide to coparent and swap the kitten back and forth between their homes. // After telling her family how great her apartment is, Lori unknowingly entices her sisters to secretly take over her space.

programme.title: E711 - Leave No Van Behind / Sponsor Tripped
programme.desc: Vanzilla breaks down. // Lynn and friends enjoy free perks around Royal Wood.

programme.title: E111 - Where There's a Will, There's a Way / Lost in the Sauce
programme.desc: When the house AC breaks during an extreme heat wave, Will takes it upon himself to protect his family and fix it. // Ellie insists on running Raven Club like a dictatorship, so Jack & Lil quit, and Ellie must save her investigation AND best friends.

programme.title: E109 - No Friend In Sight
programme.desc: Chloe feels smothered by Max and Phoebe, and encourages them to make new friends. However, the twins unwittingly make the same friend, and begin a battle for the ages over her. Chloe's new alone time is interrupted by living room-crashing pelican.

programme.title: E104 - Beck's Big Break
programme.desc: Tori accidentally gets Beck fired from a small role in a movie, then must figure out a way to get him his job back. Meanwhile, Robbie suffers frightening nightmares about his best friend Rex.

programme.title: E804 - InTODDnito / Weather Or Not
programme.desc: When Darcy's birthday party falls on the same day as one of Lisa's hero scientist's talks, Lisa sends TODD in her place to the party. // Flip sees a lucrative business opportunity when he discovers Nacho has the ability to predict the weather.

programme.title: E111 - Where There's a Will, There's a Way / Lost in the Sauce
programme.desc: When the house AC breaks during an extreme heat wave, Will takes it upon himself to protect his family and fix it. // Ellie insists on running Raven Club like a dictatorship, so Jack & Lil quit, and Ellie must save her investigation AND best friends.

E17 - Boston's Little Girl Lost
programme.desc: When an infant's body washes up on the shores of Deer Island, Massachusetts, residents rally to find out who she is, and what happened to her. Their unprecedented solidarity gets nationwide attention.

programme.desc: 20,000 Chinese children are kidnapped every year to feed a voracious baby trafficking industry. How did this happen? Who's behind it? And can anyone stop it?

programme.desc: Melissa Lucio was sentenced to death for the murder of her two-year-old daughter, Mariah, and in January 2022 she was given an official execution date of April 27, 2022.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: Crayon Shinchan: The Storm Called: Operation Golden Spy
programme.desc: A girl named Remon suddenly appears. She shows Shinnosuke a message which is sent from Shinnosuke's hero action mask. Shinnosuke totally believes Remon and they start spy training together. They duo become action spies and finally get a mission from the action mask. That mission is '.. the doctor of evil stole my precious capsule. Take it back'.

programme.title: All Shall Be Well
programme.desc: Angie and Pat are a lesbian couple who have been together for over four decades. Pat bought an apartment over thirty years ago where they have lived ever since. The couple is open to their families and often invites Pat's family to their home for dinners. Angie's relationship with them has always been very close. When Pat passes away unexpectedly, Angie is suddenly left on her own to deal with matters related to Pat and her estate. It is not too long before a clash develops over their opinions about the burial arrangements. Angie begins to feel increasingly alienated from Pat's family...

programme.title: Tiger Zinda Hai
programme.desc: RAW Agent Tiger teams up with Zoya to rescue nurses trapped by terrorists. Together, they face danger and risk everything to bring the hostages to safety in a daring mission. Release Year: 2017 Director: Ali Abbas Zafar Awards: 2018 WinnerTechnical Award- Best Action- Tom Struthersstunt coordinator, 2018 WinnerTechnical Award- Best Cinematography- Marcin Laskawiec
